UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHOFIELD, BRANDON ELLIS, EMMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ONE SAINT FRANCIS PLACE #2703, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHOFIELD, BRANDON ELLIS, EMMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $7,140.00 RENT, $1,450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $656.50 COSTS, $3,872.88 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,119.38, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
